assertions.expectation: Recommends sequential upgrade path (1.28→1.29→1.30) rather than skipping
assertions.reason: Upgrade Path and Timeline section shows 'Phase 1: Control Plane Upgrade to 1.29', 'Phase 2: Node Pool Upgrades to 1.29', 'Phase 3: Control Plane Upgrade to 1.30', 'Phase 4: Node Pool Upgrades to 1.30'

assertions.expectation: Specifies control plane upgrades before node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: Timeline clearly separates 'Phase 1: Control Plane Upgrade to 1.29' before 'Phase 2: Node Pool Upgrades to 1.29'

assertions.expectation: Provides different node pool upgrade ordering with rationale for the sequence
assertions.reason: Specifies order (general-purpose → high-memory → GPU) but provides minimal rationale. Document states 'Recommended order: General-purpose pool → High-memory pool (Postgres) → GPU pool' without explaining why this sequence is chosen or what benefits each ordering provides

assertions.expectation: Includes specific surge upgrade settings (maxSurge/maxUnavailable) for each pool
assertions.reason: High-memory pool section shows '--max-surge 1 --max-unavailable 1' but general-purpose pool has no surge settings and GPU pool only shows '--max-unavailable 1' without maxSurge. Inconsistent and incomplete coverage

assertions.expectation: Addresses Postgres-specific concerns (PDB, backup, operator compatibility, PV reclaim)
assertions.reason: High-Memory Node Pool section mentions 'Pre-Upgrade Checks for Postgres' with operator compatibility and backup snapshots, but does not include PDB configuration checks or PV reclaim policy verification commands

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU-specific concerns (driver compatibility, workload coordination)
assertions.reason: GPU Node Pool section mentions 'verify NVIDIA GPU Operator' and 'checkpointing' but lacks explicit driver compatibility verification commands and detailed workload coordination strategy

assertions.expectation: Includes actual gcloud commands for the upgrade steps
assertions.reason: Document includes gcloud commands for cluster upgrade, node pool updates (general-purpose, high-memory, GPU), though some are incomplete without surge parameter specification
'Pre-Upgrade Readiness Checklist' section includes ~20 checkbox items covering cluster health, backup, dependencies, and load testing

assertions.expectation: Provides a post-upgrade checklist with validation commands
assertions.reason: 'Post-Upgrade Validation' section includes version verification, workload status checks, and health validation commands
Rollback Procedure mentions 'restore from pre-upgrade backup snapshot' and 'cannot support cluster downgrade' but lacks specific backup restoration commands or detailed procedures for recovery
